title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 408.237 - Applicability of sections 408.231 to 408.241
text:
408.237.  Applicability of sections 408.231 to 408.241. — Sections 408.231 to 408.241 shall not apply to any transaction in which a single extension of credit is allocated between a first lien and any number of subordinate liens, for the purpose or with the result of contracting for or receiving a higher rate of interest than would have been permitted if the loan had been made under section 408.030.
(L. 1979 S.B. 305, A.L. 1994 H.B. 1312 merged with S.B. 718)
